name: rust-development
description: Rust engineering guidance for implementation, debugging, documentation, crate research, coding standards, and unsafe review.

interface.shortDescription: Build, review, debug, and document Rust code.
interface.longDescription: Practical Rust engineering guidance covering idiomatic APIs, ownership, debugging, documentation, crate research, coding standards, and unsafe-code review.
defaultPrompt: Review this Rust change for correctness and API quality.
Trace the root cause of this Rust failure.
Audit the unsafe code in this crate.
